label: Phone Link
description: Google Messages for web, boxed into a Meridian NetBrowse instance pinned to this section - connect your phone (via the QR pairing flow Google Messages shows on first load) to see and reply to your texts from Meridian Launcher. Uses Meridian NetBrowse's virtual mouse (A: left click, B: right click), Start: on-screen keyboard, and a stripped-down menu with only Exit Program.
